mapper.sql: select enterprise_id, enterprise_name, credit_code, industry_category, region_code, region_name, enterprise_scale, contact_name, contact_phone, address, longitude, latitude, geocode_status, geocode_message, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from survey_enterprise
mapper.select: select group_id from survey_enterprise_group_rel where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
mapper.update:
update survey_enterprise set del_flag = '2' where enterprise_id in
#{enterpriseId}
mapper.delete:
delete from survey_enterprise_group_rel where enterprise_id in
#{enterpriseId}
mapper.insert:
insert into survey_enterprise_group_rel(enterprise_id, group_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
